nodes.label: WebSocket tunnel frame schema (Phase 4).  Eight frame kinds, all JSON, per ``des
All frame kinds; the value is the JSON wire string.
Runner's first frame on a fresh tunnel.      :param runner_version: Runner's sem
Server → runner: execute this HTTP request locally.
Runner → server: status code + response headers.
Runner → server: a body chunk; repeated for streaming responses.
Server → runner: abort an in-flight request.
Either direction: keepalive response — echoes the ping's ts.
Server → runner: open a tunneled WebSocket channel.      The runner dispatches i
Either direction: one WebSocket frame on a channel.      ``encoding="utf-8"`` ca
Either direction: close a tunneled WebSocket channel.
Serialize a frame to its JSON wire form.      The output is what goes onto the W
Parse a JSON wire frame back into its dataclass.      :raises ValueError: On mal
Parse a JSON frame object.      :param text: Raw JSON frame text.     :returns:
Parse the frame kind discriminator.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :
Decode a frame with a validated kind.      :param kind: Parsed frame kind.     :
Decode a hello frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :returns: Typed
Decode a request frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :returns: Typ
Decode a response-head frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :return
Decode a response-body frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :return
Decode a request-cancel frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :retur
Decode a WebSocket-open frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :retur
Decode a WebSocket data frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :retur
Decode a WebSocket-close frame.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :retu
Return an optional string field.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :par
Return an optional boolean field.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :pa
Return an optional integer field.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :pa
Return an optional request body field.      :param msg: Decoded request frame ob
Return an optional list of strings.      :param msg: Decoded frame object.     :
Return optional HTTP headers.      :param msg: Decoded request or response-head
Decide whether a body of this content-type can be utf-8-encoded.      True for t
Return ``(encoded_body, encoding)`` for a body+content-type pair.      Picks utf
Decode a body string back to bytes per its declared encoding.
